evidence_level: binary64 sparse exact-Haar Hutchinson-GMRES diagnostic not validated
limitations: The gains are Hutchinson estimates of Frobenius ratios, not certified operator-norm uppers for the RH-48 directional condition.
Branch reduction uses floating eigenfactors and GMRES solves with archived residual diagnostics.
The sparse matrices use an eight-sigma cutoff and exact row renormalization.
